notes:
All 48 teams confirmed qualified for FIFA World Cup 2026 (hosts USA/Canada/Mexico) cross-checked across FIFA.com, Wikipedia, and ESPN: UEFA 16, CAF 10, AFC 9, CONMEBOL 6, CONCACAF 6, OFC 1. Debutants: Cape Verde (CPV), Curaçao (CUW), Jordan (JOR), Uzbekistan (UZB). FIFA 3-letter codes verified against Soccerphile's WC2026 code list and cross-checked with Wikipedia's "List of FIFA country codes" (note FIFA-specific codes that differ from ISO: Saudi Arabia=KSA, South Africa=RSA, Iran=IRN, DR Congo=COD, Curaçao=CUW, Cape Verde=CPV, Ivory Coast=CIV, Portugal=POR, Switzerland=SUI, Germany=GER, Netherlands=NED).

HONESTY NOTE: No match scores, standings, or draw/group placements were invented or reported. Per the task, those were not requested in the output fields; the only items returned are stable factual/cultural attributes (FIFA codes, national colors, national emblems), not live sports results.

Colors: primaryHex is the dominant kit/branding color, secondaryHex a complementary identity color, both drawn from each nation's flag and traditional home kit. A few notable kit-vs-flag nuances: Netherlands primary is "Oranje" orange (not its flag's red/white/blue); Italy-style note N/A; Argentina/Uruguay use sky blue (celeste); Australia branding leans green-and-gold (kit) rather than flag colors; New Zealand "All Whites" branding is black/white. Hex values are conventional/widely-used approximations of each nation's color identity and may differ slightly from any single official kit-manufacturer spec for the 2026 edition.

Symbols: each is a gentle natural or cultural emblem chosen to avoid offensive or crude stereotypes, suitable for an original cartoon mascot loosely inspired by the country (animals, birds, flowers, or heraldic motifs). Where a country shares an emblem with a neighbor (e.g., Andean condor for Colombia and Ecuador; Sun of May for Argentina and Uruguay; edelweiss for Austria and Switzerland; elk/moose for Norway and Sweden), this reflects genuine shared cultural/natural heritage. For Spain a friendly bull silhouette is suggested rather than any bullfighting imagery.
